failedAssertions.reason: books/sample-book.md is shown as pending in Sources, but wiki/entities/typescript.md frontmatter lists sources: [books/sample-book.md], so the ingestion indicator is incorrect.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance for agent-browser with explicit single-run isolation boundaries for source-manager assertions.
Documented fallback to Source Manager file input when OS-level drag gestures are unavailable in headless runs, while preserving upload verification requirements.
